chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6071 of 2017 CP D 5173 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.25232/20217. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr. Anwer Mansoor Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Present petitions assail FBR’s subsequent interpretation of SRO 678(i)/2004. Per learned counsel the GD was filed subsequently later in 2016 and provisional release of the consignment took place, however, the assessment was not finalized in view of the present petition. Counsel states that the respondent may be directed to finalize the assessment in accordance with law vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and that pending aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent is present and states that they have no cavil to the aforesaid and petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
